Solana copy trading bot

Copy Solana wallets with safety and exit controls

SlimeWire helps you watch wallets, mirror selected activity, review token risk, and manage copied trades from Telegram or the web terminal.

Open @SlimeWiredBotOpen web terminal

Copy trading with context

Copying a wallet is only useful when you can control size, inspect risk, and exit quickly if the setup breaks.

Wallet tracking

Monitor wallets and KOL-style signals, then decide which activity is worth following.

Copy setup

Choose wallet, amount, slippage, and optional exits instead of blindly mirroring every move.

Token safety checks

SlimeShield helps surface liquidity, holder, authority, and risk notes before a copied entry.

Auto exits

Add take-profit, stop-loss, timer exits, and sell sizing to copied trades.

Position view

Track copied bags, balances, PnL, sells, and charts in the terminal.

Telegram alerts

Use @SlimeWiredBot for faster mobile prompts and trade status updates.

How the flow works

1. Pick a wallet

Paste or select the wallet you want to monitor from SlimeWire's copy tools.

2. Configure risk

Set amount, slippage, wallet choice, and optional TP/SL before the copy plan runs.

3. Watch and adjust

Review each copied position in SlimeWire and sell manually or through your configured exits.

SlimeWire vs simple copy bots

Many copy bots only mirror. SlimeWire keeps the decision layer visible: chart, token scan, position controls, wallet balances, and Telegram trade management.

Copy smarter

Use safety and market context before treating another wallet as a signal.

Control entries

Presets and wallet choices let you keep copy trades sized to your risk.

Exit faster

Manage positions with one-tap sells, TP/SL, timer exits, and PnL visibility.

FAQ

What is a Solana copy trading bot?

A Solana copy trading bot watches another wallet and can mirror selected buys or alerts into your own wallet based on the settings you choose.

Can SlimeWire copy any wallet?

SlimeWire lets you track Solana wallets and build copy setups around visible wallet activity, while still giving you amount, slippage, safety, and exit controls.

Does copy trading guarantee profit?

No. Copy trading follows another wallet's activity, but that wallet can be wrong, late, or risky. SlimeWire adds safety checks and exit tools, but risk remains.

Can I add take-profit and stop-loss to copied buys?

Yes. SlimeWire supports protected entries and managed plans with take-profit, stop-loss, timer exits, and sell-size settings.

Can I manage copied trades on mobile?

Yes. You can use @SlimeWiredBot from Telegram and open the SlimeWire web terminal for charts, positions, wallet balances, and PnL.

Start copy trading from Telegram

Open SlimeWire, choose a wallet to track, and keep your exit controls close.
